title: The VR industrial modpack
description: create botania promenade and more! alls premade for a vr usage.
body:
a easy to install VR pack where create,botania,farmer'sDelight and forgero are the bigest focus. but dont be fool you also get new biomes with promenade. and for go faster you can also build vehicles with Automobility.and for make stuf more easy you can mine entire vein with vein miner and cut alls tree with tree harverster.
and mostly you dont need to strugle with some mods version in that pack alls is premade and ready to play.
